home.badge: Powered by Advanced AI & Knowledge Graphs
home.subheadline: Get AI-assisted diagnosis for rare conditions in under a minute. Connect with specialists worldwide for expert second opinions.
home.featuresSubtitle: From symptom input to specialist consultation — a complete platform for rare disease care.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Four steps from symptoms to answers.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of patients and physicians using AI to tackle rare diseases.

features.aiDiagnosisDesc: Multi-modal ML models trained on rare disease datasets with SHAP-explained predictions.
features.realTimeMonitoringDesc: Track symptom progression and receive urgency alerts when risk levels change.
features.specialistNetworkDesc: Connect with rare disease experts via video, voice, or chat consultations.
features.hipaaCompliantDesc: End-to-end encrypted communications and secure, privacy-first data handling.
features.instantResultsDesc: Receive a detailed diagnostic report in under 30 seconds with confidence scores.
features.rareDiseaseFocusDesc: Specialized knowledge graph covering 3,000+ rare diseases and phenotypes.

steps.step1Desc: Fill out our clinical intake form with your symptoms, history, and optional lab values.
steps.step2Desc: Our models run multi-modal analysis, knowledge graph reasoning, and SHAP attribution.
steps.step3Desc: Get ranked disease predictions with probability scores and urgency recommendations.
steps.step4Desc: If high-risk, connect with a board-certified specialist in real-time.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your RareDiag account
auth.registerSubtitle: Join RareDiag — AI-powered rare disease care
auth.mustAgreeTerms: You must agree to the terms

diagnosis.clinicalIntakeSubtitle: Fill in your clinical information below. Our AI will analyze your symptoms against a rare disease knowledge base.
diagnosis.typeSymptom: Type a symptom and press Enter
diagnosis.uploadImageDesc: Drag & drop or click to upload a skin/lesion image for AI analysis

results.shapInfo: Symptom importance scores show which of your reported symptoms most influenced the AI's prediction. Higher = greater diagnostic impact.
results.noShapData: No symptom analysis data returned. Please make sure you entered at least one symptom.
results.gradcamDesc: Areas highlighted in red/yellow indicate regions the AI focused on most.
results.highRiskMessage: Your risk level is high. We strongly recommend consulting a specialist as soon as possible.
results.consultMessage: Want a second opinion? Connect with a board-certified rare disease specialist.

user.subtitle: Your health journey at a glance

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
